title: Gemsi 1024X POM PBR
description: this is a FREE!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! POM PBR 1024X texturepack made by me (popraqwe) and idk its just good and thats all i only have to sya that its in early development so yes it maybe has some bugs and yes it only changes like 20 blocks but i will add more!
body: this is a 1024X texturepack made by me its still in early progress and idk it changes blocks like stones (not ores i will add ores in next update 1-1!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!) and dirt, farmland, grass like idk only couple blocks and idk i will add something new here when version 1-1 releases like blocks i will change next.
